How can elderly remain fit and active ? 81 Eat a variety of nutrient-rich foods. Match food intake with physical activity. /c237Eat food in many divided portions in a day. /c237Avoid fried, salty and spicy foods. /c237Consume adequate water to avoid dehydration. /c237Exercise regularly. /c237
/c237POINTS TO PONDER TIPS FOR GOOD HEALTH HEALTH BENEFITS OF IODIZED SALT /c173Exercise regularly. /c173Avoid smoking, chewing of tobacco and tobacco products (Khaini, Zarda, Paan masala) and consumption of alcohol. /c173Check regularly for blood sugar, lipids and blood pressure after the age of 30 years at least every 6 months. /c173Avoid self
